title: Improve contest submission
author: WesSwogger
body:
This PR preserves my current contest submission work.

Changes:
- Adds improved export/submission handling in `train_gpt.py`
- Updates `.gitignore` to avoid committing local model artifacts and logs

Best verified 1xH100 legal result:
- final roundtrip val_bpb: 1.31630527
- total submission size: 15,154,431 bytes
- under the 16,000,000 byte contest cap

Opening as a draft while I verify final submission details and request additional 8xH100 testing.
